common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: For given shop id and region, return warehouse info including warehouse id, address id and location id, return all warehouse with once call.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: warehouse.error_can_not_find_warehouse
error_list.description: This error will show if there is no legal warehouse address for given shop id

error_list.name: warehouse.error_not_in_whitelist
error_list.description: This error will show if your shop has no permission to access multi-warehouse

error_list.name: warehouse.error_region_can_not_blank
error_list.description: This error will show if region is missing.

error_list.name: warehouse.error_region_not_valid
error_list.description: This error will show if region is not in ID, PH, VN, SG, TW, MX

error_list.name: warehouse.error_shop_id_can_not_blank
error_list.description: This error will show if shop id is missing.

request_params.description:
Type of warehouse. Applicable values: 

- 1: Pickup Warehouse

- 2: Return Warehouse


Default value is 1 (Pickup Warehouse)
request_params.name: warehouse_type

response_params.description: Messages about the error and it's cause if there're errors. It will be just return the updated information if there's no error.
response_params.name: message
response_params.sample: Your shop is not in multi-warehouse whitelist.

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: Warehouse address identifier. It should be unique for every warehouse address
children.name: warehouse_id

children.description: The warehouse name filled in when creating the warehouse address
children.name: warehouse_name

children.description:
Type of warehouse. Applicable values: 

- 1: Pickup Warehouse

- 2: Return Warehouse
children.name: warehouse_type

children.description: Location identifier for stocks. Different location_ids represent that your addresses are in different item stocks
children.name: location_id
town
children.sample: Av Maria H A dos Santos

children.description:
The holiday mode state of your address.
0: not in holiday mode

1: holiday mode active

2: holiday mode is turning of

3: holiday mode is turning on
children.name: holiday_mode_state

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/shop/get_warehouse_detail?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&region=ID&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: Your shop is not in multi-warehouse whitelist.

response.town: Av Maria H A dos Santos

update_log_list.content: update the parameter name from country to region
